summary:
THE WATCHMAN AND PROPHETIC DELAY: Brandon discusses his role in delivering prophetic warnings to the entire body of Christ, explicitly including denominations like Catholics, Baptists, and Methodists, rather than exclusively charismatics. He draws a parallel between his repeated warnings and the prophet Jeremiah, explaining that God repeats messages because human attention spans are short. Brandon emphasizes that God is currently providing a window of grace for believers to prepare for impending global shakings and a wealth transfer, urging the church to repent and return to strict holiness.

HURRICANE MIAMI AND HUMAN TRAFFICKING: Brandon recounts a highly specific vision of a devastating, compact, and extremely powerful hurricane striking Florida just south of Miami near the Keys. He describes the aftermath as resembling the destruction of Hurricane Katrina, with severe flooding and submerged buildings. In this vision, he witnessed a surge in human trafficking and armed looting, specifically seeing men with sagging pants and guns swimming through the flooded streets.

ECONOMIC COLLAPSE AND A NEW PLAGUE: Brandon details visions of an imminent economic disaster, comparing it to Trump paddling a canoe desperately against the current of Niagara Falls. He foresees a massive wave of foreclosures where the middle class must pawn luxury items to afford mortgages, leading to banks seizing assets and triggering a temporary debt jubilee. Furthermore, he warns of a new plague arriving in the fall of 2027, spread by rats and cross-contaminating pets and livestock. This engineered supervirus, linked to AI technology and common prescription medications, is designed for targeted depopulation to usher in a digital currency reset and the beast system.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND SEVERE JUDGMENTS: Brandon points to significant upcoming events in September, including United Nations meetings around Rosh Hashanah and a highly visible blood moon on September 7th, which he links to escalating wars. He claims European nations like Italy, the United Kingdom, France, and Germany are acting as puppet masters manipulating the situation in Ukraine to perpetuate conflict and launder money. He also prophesies severe judgments upon celebrities involved in child trafficking, predicting sudden deaths, and warns of a horrific new venereal disease that will be worse than anything previously seen.

THE TRIBULATION AND THE RAPTURE: Brandon shares a vision from July 2014 depicting the horrors of the Tribulation. He describes the rapture occurring with a thunderous sonic boom, taking the faithful and all children under fifteen, while half the church is left behind due to spiritual compromise. Those remaining face a terrifying reality ruled by an Antichrist who enforces a microchip mark that turns people into emotionless zombies, while dissenters are tracked by swarms of drones and beheaded. He describes survivors starving in the mountains, drinking poisoned water, and suffering through apocalyptic weather events.

CALL TO HOLINESS AND MIRACULOUS PROVISION: Brandon passionately urges believers to abandon double lives, worldly compromises, and lukewarm faith, stressing the necessity of total commitment to Jesus. He reassures the faithful that God will supernaturally provide for them during the coming hardships, sharing a vision of empty pots spontaneously filling with hot food and recounting a historical story of Oral Roberts experiencing miraculous provision. Brandon encourages his listeners to cultivate strong faith now during times of peace, promising that those who trust God and live holy lives will not be forsaken during the impending global crises.
rawData: [August 22, 2025]-[I remember something new about Tribulation]-[https://youtu.be/33JdXhIQEhU]-[Good morning, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. Well, I have my sweetheart here with me, and I told her I wanted her to say something at the very beginning. Yes. Good morning. Good morning. Thank you so much. Yeah. I seem to talk too much when I get on here, and I said, "You need to say some more." So, I'm going to make you say hi. Hi! She has so much inside of her, and I want her to talk more, but she doesn't like talking in front of the camera as much. But that's okay. I say what the Holy Spirit tells me to say. I chime in whenever I feel prompted. Yeah. Well, it's all right. I talk the most, I guess. But I enjoy listening. I enjoy it. I was driving around. I asked the Lord today when we were driving, and I told the Lord, I said, "Lord, why? Why is it that I say things, but it seems to be that I give these words and you have me tell the body of Christ what's on the heart of the Father, but it seems like weeks go by and nothing? We're talking about certain things, and then all of a sudden he'll drop it and say, 'Say that again.'" And he brought it up to me and he said, "How many times did Jeremiah warn the people?" And I said, "Well, that's interesting. Whenever all the other words that were going forth, there were so many other words and I wasn't in any of it, but then he brought up one man." And folks, I'm telling you, I'm not Jeremiah, but he just brings that to me and shows me in the scripture where he warned the people over and over. And it seemed like it was redundant. Like, why? When you read the Book of Jeremiah, why did he go over that so many times? But he said people's attention spans only last a couple of weeks, Brandon, up to a couple of months, and they'll have it fresh on their heart. Because time goes by and things kind of sizzle down, and then you throw more gas on the flame, and it sizzles up. People say, "How many times?" I've heard the emails: "Oh, you're really freaking me out," and everything. But like Braden said, "Dad, you've said this so many times. This is nothing new. You've been talking this way, telling people this for over how many years, warning that this is coming. A shaking's coming." And the Lord keeps warning and preparing the church. Then he tells us he's given us more time to prepare because of grace. And he said, "Brandon, I want you to tell my people I'm giving you a window of opportunity for the wealth of the sinner to be laid up for the righteous, to get your house in order because these great shakings are coming." This has not changed. And a lot of people get upset when you say "as a whole," the apple as a whole. I'm not talking about charismatics as a whole. When the Father is talking about "as a whole," he's not saying Word of Faith people. He's not saying the non-denominationals. He's saying the body of Christ: Baptists, Methodists, Catholics. And I think it's interesting because a lot of times whenever you are talking as a charismatic, everybody thinks he's only talking to the charismatics. But I didn't realize how many Catholic brothers and sisters I have on this channel, and how many Baptists and everybody. I mean, I have a lot of different faces on this channel as we continue to grow. So, I see as the watchman, I believe he's relaying the words to the body of Christ as a whole. He wants us to repent and come back to him, bringing holiness back into the church. Not, "Well, we're talking about the Word of Faith people or the seeker-friendlies or whatever." He's talking about everybody needing to get ready because Jesus Christ is coming. Regardless of what denomination you think I'm talking to, I'm not pointing out any denomination. I'm pointing out the body as a whole, based on what the Lord has put on my heart. So I have to clear that up to make sure you all realize that just because I speak in tongues, just because I believe in the fire, doesn't mean that I am speaking directly to the charismatics. I'm speaking to everyone. So, I hope I make that clear because there are so many people that I think that confuses: "Whoa, is this coming to..." No, folks. When I'm talking about pastors falling dead like Ananias and Sapphira, it's across all denominational barriers. I think it's interesting because the charismatics really believe the end times revolve around them because we speak in tongues and we walk in the gifts of the Spirit. But God said, "I'll pour out my Spirit upon all flesh," not just charismatics, all flesh. Anybody who will say yes. He said it's all hands on deck, for the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. So if you are a person who wants to bring in the harvest and you're out there with the sickle saying, "Hey, bring in the harvest with his net." I mean, Billy Graham was a Baptist, a strong Baptist, but he brought in more souls than anybody in this generation from what I understand. I mean, seriously, I don't even know what kind of denomination John Wesley was. I think he was a Methodist. So you look at who God has used; it hasn't just been charismatics. You have some others, you know, like Azusa Street was charismatic. In this next part of the video, I want to say this. People say, "Brandon, where is the hurricane coming when you said you saw one hit Florida?" I was vague. I'm praying more over what I was seeing. But I'll just tell you, because, folks, regardless of the persecution I get, I'm going to get it regardless. So, I'm just going to tell you, it's Miami. I saw Miami, but it was a little lower than Miami. It was coming up by the Keys. Right before the Keys start, there's that little sliver of land right there. You have Miami, a little bit of land, and then it starts to go on that highway to the Florida Keys. It came right up there and the eyewall hit right through there. It wasn't a huge, 700-mile storm. It looked like a tight storm, but it was very strong that came on the land. It had the strongest wind speeds we've ever seen before, ever. And when it went across, it caused damage all around Florida. So, I need to make that clear because people were freaking out: "Hey, is it Tampa? Is it Jackson? Where is it?" No, it was Miami. And when this happened, I saw a lot of human trafficking. When I was seeing over in the spirit, the Lord showed me and said, "Human trafficking is really bad." And I saw Hispanic men swimming through the streets with their shirts off, with pants like shorts on. You know how you wear sag pants and you have your boxers pulled up higher on your belly, but your pants are sagging down? I could see their drawers more than their jeans, and they were sinking down with a belt. I saw these men swimming around with guns. This is how clear this vision was. They were swimming around in the water in the flood zone; it looked like Katrina. And I saw white buildings, and I could see them swimming around, and they were looting and doing things. I'm just telling you the vision I saw. It was very clear, and I saw great devastation in the Miami area, coming up through that area, with another hurricane like a Katrina event. That's the only way I can explain it because I've never seen anything like it. Katrina was back in 2004. That was the most devastating as a young man. I won't say kid, but I was a kid, I guess. That was probably one of the most devastating hurricanes I've ever seen in history. When the levee broke and flooded that city and the people were in that dome, it was like something out of a third-world country. I want to address that and tell you where I saw that. Now the next thing I want to say is about the economy. When I'm seeing the poverty and the great shaking over the finances, I'm telling you what I see, in my opinion, of what the Lord is showing me. I'm not trying to cause alarm in people where they're freaking out in fear. I'm trying to tell you to be prayerful about something. I want you to take this to God in prayer and help me pray over it, because I see in advance what I believe the Lord is warning the body. If you go back to when I saw Trump in the canoe, paddling as fast as he could in the single-man canoe, paddling and paddling, trying to not go over Niagara Falls—I could see the waterfall was massive, and he was just yards away from going over, but he was sustaining in one place, keeping it afloat as hard as he could, paddling, trying to push, trying to get out of it. But the current was too strong. You knew that it was just a matter of time before he was going over. And that was part of the vision. If you go to each one of my visions that the Lord gives us when we're praying, they all have a similarity, like a puzzle piece to it. It's not like it's springing out of nowhere. "Where is that coming from? That's like a wild hair." No, it's all strategic, pinpoint things of what the Lord is warning us about, like Trump paddling. What is the next thing? I saw lines of people. He brought up the housing market again, and people foreclosing because they couldn't afford their homes—big mortgage homes. Remember, I've told you before, I saw the middle class. They had nice jewelry, nice watches, nice stuff, and they were pawning it off, trying to get rid of it because they needed to make their mortgage payment because they were too top-heavy, with too much debt. So they were getting rid of their Rolex or their nice boat because they didn't need a boat. They were just like, "How do I dump this boat as fast as I can?" or "I don't need this extra sports car. I need a nice family car, and I don't want to have a Ferrari." That is the way I was seeing it. But because of what was happening in the market, everything was going so cheap, like designer purses and stuff. They were trying to just dump them when these major events happen. And that's why I saw the banks seizing all the homes, major banks seizing all the homes, seizing all the car notes. It became a debt jubilee, kind of like it was when they froze everything during COVID and said, "You don't have to make your student loan payments for a while. You can still live here, but you don't have to make your student loan payments anymore because we understand everybody is trying to overcome, has been sick, and can't go to work." So there was a time of, I don't know, almost a year or two years for some student loans. They're just now starting to kick that back in for some folks. And then for mortgages, sometimes there was like three or four months where people didn't have to make payments during COVID, and they were giving out stimulus checks. So that's what I was seeing again. Now take what I just told you and go to the fall of 2027. The Lord told us another plague was coming that would be released by rats. Everything He's showing, as I'm telling you, is a puzzle piece. What would cause this again? It would be released by rats. This will not be released by bats in a lab like it was last time with COVID. This is spun off of bats, but it will be released by rats. I saw those plastic containers, and they were injecting these rats and seeing if they would live for a period of time so they could spread the virus. But I said it will not only affect humans this time, but there will be a cross-contamination of cattle and your pets. That's what the Lord told us. So He keeps warning us, but He said this time there will be no vaccination brought up in the media, for it will be like a supervirus connected to AI technology. I saw it was linked to medicines, like diabetic medicines, heart medicines, and all these other things. Now, will it make me sick if I take that? No, that's not what I'm trying to say. I try to communicate as best I can what I'm seeing in the spirit. What I'm telling you is that they took the genetic code of these certain prescription medicines, and they intermingled the DNA code of this virus through AI technology to create a virus designed to commit genocide on certain individuals on purpose. Does that make sense? Because, remember, if you go back with me, I saw how top-heavy it was, how much money was being flooded into the healthcare system because it was a drain on the economy. As you get ready to have the digital dollar reset, it's a new way of doing things because the old way is too top-heavy. I saw on an article that worldwide debt was 352 trillion dollars. 352 trillion, I believe, is what they said. That is an incredible amount of money. So that was what it was all combined, what I saw. It's all gearing up for the beast system, the mark of the beast, the One World Order, all the things that the Bible tells us is coming. There will be a time when it goes over the edge. Now, I believe God told us, "I'm giving you a window for a harvest." A lot of people are still stuck on this, saying that prophet so-and-so said this or prophet so-and-so said that. I personally don't see the rapture of the church taking place on September 23rd. What I do see coming is a time of a 24-hour change where everything will change. What we found out through these articles, what Diana found out—she said, "Brandon, the UN major week, the high-level week, or something like that." It's the one where they make the big decisions. It starts on the 23rd, which is the beginning of Rosh Hashanah. Exactly. It's the 23rd through the 24th when they're going to make some—I mess up the word every time, so I let her do it. I thought you were laughing at how I said it. No, I said it because I was like, "Did I say it wrong? Say it better." I was going to mess up, and I didn't want to. There's no editing. Go, you do it. What is it? But here we are, the 23rd and 24th, that whole week. That's not a coincidence. Then we have the blood moon that will be seen by seven billion people on the 7th of September. I messed that up, I have to say. It's not 7-Eleven. 7-Eleven is July. I told her, "I don't know where I got 7-Eleven, but it just came out of me." 7-Eleven, like the gas station. Forgive me, because some of you are asking, "What's about 7-Eleven?" No, it's not 7-Eleven; it's September 7th, which would be 9/7. Yes, 9/7. Go back to school, Brandon. I'm just saying 9/7 is very important, but we always freak out about 9/11. That's what I was trying to think in there. So, it's close to it, but that's when the eclipse is. Okay. So, that's what I was trying to say is 9/7 is the eclipse. But Putin said, "I don't want to meet. I need more time to prepare and it needs to be at least two weeks away, which would be going into September." And I thought that's interesting. The eclipse is over Russia, all that area, and he wants to meet around the first part of September. And I believe the blood moons represent war a lot of times, right? From what I understand, I need to have Jonathan Cahn come on and talk about all this stuff because he is really educated and that'd be really cool. Maybe I can get him on sometime and talk to him about the Shemitah cycle, the blood moons, where we are right now in the end times. I think that'd be cool. Maybe he would want to. But I just think these things are important to go over with you all because of what the Lord's told me about September and he's highlighted it so strong inside of me to pray over the next couple of weeks. We're only two weeks away, a week and a half away until we start going into September. And I'm like, "Lord, I know this is not a coincidence." Now, I've seen mixed reactions to Zelensky's report and what was said. I thought it was interesting that Italy—just like I told you all Italy would come—it happened. The United Kingdom came, France, and Germany, and I said, "You can't script that." It's exactly what I saw in the vision of who the people would come and start negotiating this thing, and they're the puppet masters manipulating Zelensky, and Zelensky is just a "yes, sir" with the Pinocchio nose and doing all the things that I've seen him doing and lying. They don't want to de-escalate and not have war. They want to keep this sucker going. I told you about the money and the money laundering and the things we saw in the spirit two videos ago about the money, the children, and the trafficking of the children. And even Italy brought up—or whoever that was, that blonde-headed lady said, "Where are all the kids at?" I was like, "Let me tell you where they are. They're all throughout Europe being trafficked." I saw it in the spirit; it's terrible, it's sickening. And that's what the Lord said: judgment. I'm telling you folks, you're going to start seeing celebrities doing these acts, these horrendous things to these children, just fall over dead. And I saw a new venereal disease, a new venereal disease that was coming that would be worse than AIDS or any kind of herpes or anything combined, that would be not just a blood thing, but I'm talking about a terrible groin infection on men and women. That was something out of... it looked like it was disgusting. You know, Diana and I, she's going over scriptures and going on with me and just talking about drawing close to the Father. Not saying that we're anything better. I didn't mean it like, "Well, we don't hang out with certain people." I want to rephrase that. I was saying it like Kathryn Kuhlman kept herself separate and unto the Lord. And she said, "I don't have a social life." And there's a lot of times whenever I realize that I complain. I said, "Lord, I like to do all this stuff." And the Lord said, "No, I'm keeping you set apart right now. I don't want anybody influencing your mind or what I'm giving you to say." And the more you get around other people, I realize the more God has called us to do and say these words in the end times of warnings. It's like there's some people that are called to be edifiers and they edify and they uplift. They tell everybody, "You know, you've got what it takes," but I'm here to tell you judgment's coming. And the Lord told me, the first thing he said was, "Brandon, I've called you to say the hard things. I've called Diana to say the hard things. I'm going to call you to say things that nobody else wants to say, but I want you to say it and be bold about it. And I want you to say it, and it will prove to be accurate in the days ahead." Just because you don't see it immediately, just like Jeremiah, it didn't happen immediately, and they wanted to kill him. The Lord said that people are not going to like you for what you say. And I've seen a lot of that lately. It makes you feel very alone. And I told D, "Man, but I know I hear my Father's voice and I know what he's warning and telling me to tell the people: to get your life right, to repent, to get out of compromise, to stop having a double-standard life, thinking that you can live and you've gotten away with all this sin and you're getting away with it preaching behind the pulpit, and you're thinking you can look at porn, you think you can drink socially, and you think you can be like the world and there's no difference between you and the world." If you had a lineup and you would say, "Who's guilty here?" and you're going through the court of law, and you say, "Who's the Christian and who's the world?" a lot of you wouldn't know because the way your wife's dressed, the way you dress, the way they carry themselves—there's no holiness. And that's what the Lord is telling me. He said, "Be ye holy as I am holy. Walk upright before me. You're the bride. Walk beside me." Because after I gave this strong word, I was driving around the car and he gave us another word and he was talking to us. He said, "Brandon, it's like a husband that has eyes for another woman. As he's hugging onto the wife, you're looking over your shoulder looking at another girl. 'Oh, I love you, babe. I love you.' But you're gazing at somebody else as they're doing whatever." When you're walking right beside him, you don't have any eyes for somebody else. The world is not attracted to you. You're sold out. It's like me and her. I don't care—committed, we've been married for a long time, she's been through the good times, the bad times, and the middle times, whatever, but you keep working it out. That's a good marriage. But I'm saying there is no other woman, period. You know what I'm saying? And regardless, that's the way it is with the Lord. He was talking about how our marriage is, but he was talking about how a lot of people have their backup plan, their plan B. That's what he's saying. There's a lot of plan B's. "Well, if the relationship with the Lord is not too good, it's okay. I've got a little foot over here at the world and you're floating around with a little bit of the world over here," but it's not just sold out to that individual. And that's what he was talking about: being just sold out to him. You don't have a cheating heart. Your cheating heart will tell on you. I don't know, but it's important that we are sold out to the Lord in these last days and just say, "God, I'm all in. Where are you in this end-time army?" and know that he has a plan for your life. He wants the best for you. He wants to see you whole. He wants to see you healed. It's like he told me, "Brandon, I want it more than what you do." And I line up with what the word of God says. And he says, "By his stripes, I'm healed." I'm healed. But I'm not going to expect God's blessing on stuff if I'm in with the world, too. "Well, you know, I give God a chance every once in a while. He's over here." I just want him to look at me and say, "Diana, we were going over this scripture: wide is the gate. Wide is the gate and narrow is the path, and few are those that find it. What does that truly mean?" For wide is the gate and narrow is the path. Narrow is the way. Where is that? What is that? Have you ever—I mean, really think about those scriptures. 'And few'—He didn't say a bunch or quite a few; He said a few. What's a few? That's like a handful. Few are those that find it. When He said, 'Depart from me, I never knew you,' those scriptures just really stand out. And those are the ones we kind of want to bypass because they're kind of uncomfortable, and you really don't know what it is. It's like, 'I don't know about that scripture,' but those two scriptures kind of go together, and you go, 'Hmm, what is He really saying there?' And that's why I thought, 'I don't want that question in my mind. All I want to know is that I am all in.' And I want you to know that you're all in today, that you're just sold out to Jesus. And that's why the Lord told me, 'Bring altar calls every single time. Bring these altar calls and pray for the people that they have a decision.' Yes, give them an opportunity to make a decision today. I thought it was interesting also that Trump said, 'I just want to make sure I go to heaven today.' I thought, 'Wow, that's amazing.' The president of the United States—it is on his heart: 'If something happens, I just want to make sure that I make heaven.' There's a stirring in him. There's a stirring in him as we're praying for his marriage, as we're praying for him to stay away from Jezebel, praying for him to stay away from this girl that will try to seduce him and be the next Marilyn Monroe. I believe he's watching these videos. I truly do, because we're praying for him, and I know that I was told Eric watches sometimes, and I think that's neat. If you're watching, Eric, hey, I'm excited you're watching. We pray for your daddy all the time. We pray for you. We pray for your brothers and sisters. We pray a covering over your family. God has a plan for you all, and I'm excited you're our first kids. What do you want to call them, the president's kids? Is that what you call them? I don't know. That sounds odd, doesn't it? 'Kids.' Is that 'first lady,' 'first kids'? I don't know. First, first... it works. That's what we're going to say: they're the first kids. We're going to pray God puts a hedge around all of them, even the first grandkids. You know, it works. It's serious. But I believe God's got His hand on all the firsts, and He's got it on the seconds and the thirds. I know He has a plan for each one of us, but I know that this is not the end of the end. We're going to see a great harvest of souls, and I'm believing God for a financial harvest for our family. Big stuff. We're believing for big stuff. When you see all that we have to do, it's going to take a lot to do it. And I just keep believing that God's got this, and He has not brought us this far to fail. His hand is not short, and in all this that I keep seeing, He's going to always provide. Braden brought it up. He said, 'Daddy, do you remember when you saw the people praying around the table? There was no food in the pots.' And there was a whole bunch of them in this time of prayer. And the Lord said, 'I'm going to supernaturally provide for My people. There will be no food in the pots.' And they set the table all around, and they'll say grace, and food will come in those pots instantaneously. Where there was no food, He will provide food. He said, 'I've never seen the righteous forsaken or his seed begging bread, regardless of what we see and what's coming in the near future.' I told somebody—I think it was Doc, this guy, his name on the chat was Doc and he was on there while we were watching—'I'm not participating in the economic disaster. I refuse to participate in it. For God gives seed to the sower and bread.' I believe He will take care of His own as we have. If you're faithful with tithing, if you're faithful in giving, if you've been faithful with little, He'll make you ruler over much. And I believe when I saw those people praying over those pots and food came in there, it wasn't just beans. It was foods like turkey, mashed potatoes, and gravy—and boom, right there. It was like all of a sudden when they prayed, the glory came into the house, filled those pots up with food, and steam was coming off the food. I saw the lady in the vision take the lid off this big pot, and there were tons of people in this house, and I saw her take the lid off, and all of a sudden, steam started coming up from this hot food. Praise God. And there was nothing in there before, and they had set it like they were having a feast, like a Thanksgiving Day feast. Candles were on there. I could see they were anticipating God to show up and show off in their life. And God did, because why? Because that's the kind of God we serve. In the middle of the night, I remember hearing... Was it George Mueller? No, not George Mueller. But there was another one I remember hearing: it was Oral Roberts. And Oral Roberts said their papa was out preaching, and there was no food in the house, and the people at the church didn't take care of them very much. They didn't have any food, and they were really, really hungry. I'm talking really hungry. And his brother was mouthing off to Oral on the way home, saying, 'God doesn't take care of us,' and just popping off. He said, 'Shut up, or I'm going to hit you in the head,' basically, because God is going to take care of us. And so they got all the way home, and he was bickering back and forth, him and his brother, because they didn't have anything to eat. And all of a sudden, Mama—because Mama said, 'I'm not going to beg for money. We're not going to do anything'—well, they got invited over to the neighbor's house, and she had all that food set out, remember? And they saw them eating the food, and Mama said, 'No, we're fine.' And he was thinking, 'No, we're not! We're starving!' They sat there and watched them because they said, 'Do you want to eat some of this?' and she said, 'No, we're okay. We're going to be just fine. God's going to take care of us.' So they went home, and what happened? Something hit their door. Somebody knocked on their door, and when they opened the door, there was all this food—all these groceries. There was a full turkey, gravy, biscuits—and it was at night. It was at night, and he said Mom went in there, and they were so hungry she made a big feast. She goes, 'Oral, go get the flour.' She got a big sack of flour, she got the eggs, and she said, 'Oral, go get the stuff out there. I'm going to make something to eat.' So they made it at night. They had a huge feast of biscuits and gravy, and they went to bed. And he told his little brother, 'I told you God would provide for us. I told you God would provide for us.' And every time I hear that, I say, 'He'll do it again and again. He'll do it again and again if you believe Him.' I'm a believing believer. I'm not a doubter. And I tell you these stories of what God is doing to inspire you to believe for your family in the days ahead, to say, 'Hey, I'm not going to participate in this.'
